name: Miyu Yamano
description: A girl who appears to be 13 or 14 years old but in fact is much older, being a vampire. Even though she is a vampire, Miyu isn't harmed by sunlight, holy water or crucifixes, and her reflection can be seen. Though she does need to drink blood to survive, she chooses her 'victims' carefully. name: Oliver
description: Oliver is an orphan who was shipped out of the Grand Valley orphanage by Leuvis. He was moved over to Goldy Pond, where he became one of the leaders of the Goldy Pond Resistance organization together with Lucas.

name: Tapion
description: Tapion is a fictional character from Dragon Ball Z Movie 13: Wrath of the Dragon. He acts as the protagonist of this film and is described as a 'Legendary Hero' from the planet Konats ('Konnatsuu'). This makes his race the 'Konnatsuu-jin' (Konats Race). He is roughly six feet tall, has light purple skin and a mohawk (similar style to that of the Supreme Kai) of bright red hair. He wields a sword and an ocarina which he says are gifts from god.

name: Togepy
description: Togepy is a small, light yellow Pokémon with a round body that is still encased in its eggshell. Togepy does not shed its shell. The Egg has red and blue shapes on it.
